value_chain_position: Large-cap medtech; designs, manufactures, and sells cardiovascular, neuromodulation, urology, and endoscopy devices including electrophysiology mapping systems and robotic bronchoscopy (Ion).
relative_comps: Boston Scientific is a diversified medtech platform with growing exposure to robotics_automation via its Ion robotic bronchoscopy system and electrophysiology pulsed-field ablation (PFA) technology. PFA is the fastest-growing segment in cardiac ablation — BSX's Farawave catheter is a market-share gainer against Medtronic and J&J. Revenue CAGR of 16.5% and 17.4% YoY growth are exceptional for a $70B-cap company. BSX occupies a chokepoint in ablation hardware due to capital-equipment installed base creating consumable pull-through. The robotics tag is credible but secondary — Ion is early and still a small share of revenue.
